I also got our, it was important for me to create some successes out of this group of people. So, I wanted to work with them closely. So, this live event, we limited to 50 primary spots. These are people that wanted launches brand. But we really cherry picked. This was going back to your assets. What are your assets? And I had those hyper responses and you know, you do have that top 1% on your list and that top 4% on your list. And those are the people we wanted in the seats because we were going to use them as proof going forward to sell the home study program. Right? So we used this live event, the position of the $25,000. We used having awesome people in the room. A lot of them were leaders. A lot of them were influencers. The social media was going nuts during that event. They were landing clients during the event based on Twitter. People were tweeting about wanting to hire one of these people. That's gold going forward, right? I also created a platinum level group. Now a lot of people say, how much of that money do you actually collect out of the back end at extra $20,000? What we did was we said, when we got them in the room, we said, hey, you know, I spent five days teaching. This is awesome. You got so much knowledge. But you know, the reality is Monday is going to come. You're going to be flying home. And you know, once you get out of this environment, it's going to be a lot harder to keep going. So you really want to join this coaching program. And the cool thing about this coaching program is it's not actually going to cost you any money at all. It's actually going to save you $10,000. Because if you just pay me $10,000 to be in my coaching program, because I'm so interested in you being in this program, I'll waive the $20,000 you're going to owe me out of profits. So of the 50 people in the room, I think it was like 37 took it. And the other, I don't know, it might have been, it was insane. So one of the big ideas, I've tried to build in some, translate into some of Dan's terms. This is a real business. And in my opinion, it really was because the man truly was there and there's a ton of money we made running people's launches. You don't need a product. So there are so many people online there, like these internet marketing junkies, that just study this stuff and hang out in forums and read and read and read and watch videos. And they love this internet marketing stuff, but they've never, never started. They never started building a list, which is just absolutely insane. I mean, it's like, takes five minutes to start building a list now with Facebook. I mean, give me a break. And they, or they don't have a product. So you can make a ton of money, no list, no product.
